content.query:
create view v_AP_Aging_Test2
--drop view v_AP_Aging_Test2
as

--SELECT * FROM M3.FPLEDG WHERE SINO = '9302022'
-- reco = 9, AND REDE = PAID DATE

SELECT      A.*, CASE WHEN B.[Prepaid Flag] = 'Prepaid' then 'Y' else 'N' end as [Prepaid], C.[PONumber]
FROM
(
SELECT      CASE WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 in ('CMP', 'CNR') then 'Consumer'
            else 'Pending' end as Division
,           CASE WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial' 
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            else 'Pending' end as [Business Unit]
,           FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           CM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           IVDT as [Invoice Date]
,           DUDT as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           CASE WHEN TRCD = 40 then 'Invoice' else 'Payment' end as [Transaction Type]
,           CUAM*ARAT AS [Amount]
,           CS.TX40 as [Category]
,           CASE WHEN CV.PACD = '' then 'No Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = 'A' then 'Highest Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '9' then 'Stopped'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '3' then 'Priority 3'
            ELSE 'Priority '+CV.PACD END as [Priority]
,           FP.ACDT as [Accounting Date]
,           CASE WHEN FP.RECO = '9' then 'Reconciled' else 'Not Reconciled' END as [Reconciled Status]
,           FP.LMDT as [Record Update Date]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON FP.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FP.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           'Prepaid' as [Prepaid Flag]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON FP.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FP.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       IVTP in ('PR', 'CP' ,'RC')
) B         on A.[Supplier Number] = B.[Supplier Number] and A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT FP.SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           RTRIM(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI))),0,CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CHARINDEX(' ',LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) END))) as [PONumber]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.FPLEDX FX ON FP.CONO = FX.CONO AND FP.DIVI = FX.DIVI AND FP.JRNO = FX.JRNO AND FP.JSNO = FX.JSNO AND FP.YEA4 = FX.YEA4
WHERE       FX.PEXN = 402
AND         RTRIM(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI))),0,CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CHARINDEX(' ',LTRIM(SUBSTRING(FX.PEXI, CHARINDEX(' ', FX.PEXI)+1, LEN(FX.PEXI)))) END))) IS NOT NULL
) C         on A.[Supplier Number] = C.[Supplier Number] and A.[Invoice Number] = C.[Invoice Number]
